name: undo_swap_prow_job_run_tests_and_outputs
description: Undo table swap: rename partitioned tables back to _new, restore _old tables to production names, reverse index and sequence renames
query: ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_new_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_new; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_new; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_run_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_prow_job_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_id; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_old_test_id_status RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_tests_test_id_status; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_release_timestamp RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_release_timestamp; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_prow_job_run_test_id RENAME TO idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_tests_old_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests_id_seq; ALTER SEQUENCE prow_job_run_test_outputs_old_id_seq RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs_id_seq; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests_old RENAME TO prow_job_run_tests; ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs_old RENAME TO prow_job_run_test_outputs;

name: undo_swap_test_analysis_by_job_by_dates
description: Undo table swap: rename partitioned table back to _new, restore _old table to production name, reverse index renames
query: ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_test_release_date RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_new_test_release_date; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_name_and_job RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_new_name_and_job; ALTER TABLE test_analysis_by_job_by_dates RENAME TO test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_old_test_release_date RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_test_release_date; ALTER INDEX IF EXISTS idx_test_analysis_old_name_and_job RENAME TO idx_test_analysis_name_and_job; ALTER TABLE test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_old RENAME TO test_analysis_by_job_by_dates;

name: restore_foreign_keys
description: Restore FK constraints that were dropped during the original swap
query: DO $$ BEGIN ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_test_outputs ADD CONSTRAINT fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id FOREIGN KEY (prow_job_run_test_id) REFERENCES prow_job_run_tests (id); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN RAISE NOTICE 'FK fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id already exists'; WHEN others THEN RAISE NOTICE 'Could not restore FK fk_prow_job_run_test_outputs_prow_job_run_test_id: %', SQLERRM; END $$; DO $$ BEGIN ALTER TABLE prow_job_run_tests ADD CONSTRAINT fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id FOREIGN KEY (prow_job_run_id) REFERENCES prow_job_runs (id); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN RAISE NOTICE 'FK fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id already exists'; WHEN others THEN RAISE NOTICE 'Could not restore FK fk_prow_job_run_tests_prow_job_run_id: %', SQLERRM; END $$;
